# Lat Pulldown

Also known as: front lat pulldown
Chinese alias: 颈前下拉

> Disclaimer: GymPrimer is educational content. It is not medical advice and not personalized coaching. Stop if something feels sharp or worsening. [Mayo Clinic][mayo-weight-training]

## Safety notes

Stop if you feel sharp or worsening discomfort. [Mayo Clinic][mayo-weight-training]

- [Mayo Clinic - Weight training][mayo-weight-training]
